name: Cade Kaminski
title: Mechanical Engineering Student
education: B.E. Mechanical Engineering, Colorado School of Mines (2024 to 2027)
volunteer: Platte River Academy, Summer 2025 (200+ hours). Crown Hill Church, Fall 2025.
bio: Mechanical Engineering student at Colorado School of Mines. I turn engineering problems into built things: closed loop cooling systems for AI data centers, HUD optics for ski goggles, suspension assemblies under FEA. Specialization in Business and Management.
aboutLong:
Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a Mechanical Engineering student at the Colorado School of Mines who enjoys turning ambitious ideas into functional prototypes and business opportunities. My work uses skills such as machining, CAD design, embedded systems, and rapid prototyping. Whatever the project, I am determined to make it the best version of what it can be.

Outside the lab, you'll probably find me on the slopes, in the gym, at church, or chasing down a new project or startup idea that sounded simple in my head before I started it.
